headline: IRWD Stock Down 14% in a Month: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: Ironwood slides 14% in a month on weak Linzess Q4 sales, but strong demand, partnerships, and an upbeat 2026 outlook raise investor optimism.

raw.headline: IRWD Stock Down 14% in a Month: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
raw.summary: Ironwood slides 14% in a month on weak Linzess Q4 sales, but strong demand, partnerships, and an upbeat 2026 outlook raise investor optimism.

headline: Allergan Aesthetics Releases Findings on the Safety and Efficacy of Repeat TrenibotE Treatments and Data on Medical Weight Loss Aesthetics Patient Behaviors at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Meeting (AAD)
summary: Allergan Aesthetics, an AbbVie company, presented four posters at the American Academy of Dermatology Meeting (AAD), highlighting the safety and efficacy of new and emerging products in our aesthetics portfolio and insights on the aesthetic mindset of an emerging patient population.

raw.headline: Allergan Aesthetics Releases Findings on the Safety and Efficacy of Repeat TrenibotE Treatments and Data on Medical Weight Loss Aesthetics Patient Behaviors at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Meeting (AAD)

headline: AbbVie Subsidiary Allergen Aesthetics Releases Findings On Safety And Efficacy Of Repeat TrenibotulinumtoxinE Treatments For Glabellar Lines
summary: TrenibotE is an investigational first-in-class botulinum neurotoxin serotype E characterized by rapid results, as early as 8 hours after administration (earliest assessment time), and shorter duration of effect of 2-3

raw.headline: AbbVie Subsidiary Allergen Aesthetics Releases Findings On Safety And Efficacy Of Repeat TrenibotulinumtoxinE Treatments For Glabellar Lines
